title: leucanthemum lineare
intro: Leucanthemum lineare, also known as the linear white daisy or linear dog fennel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Leucanthemum lineare can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
